description_long: This figure depicts an adult pedestrian dressed in a full-body hooded jumpsuit with a front zipper and a distinctive mask covering the face. The jumpsuit is fitted, with long sleeves and pants, and the hood is pulled up over the head, obscuring the hair. The mask has exaggerated facial features, giving the figure a mysterious or theatrical appearance. The hands are exposed, and the figure wears sturdy, ankle-high boots. The overall stance is upright and slightly relaxed, with arms hanging loosely at the sides. The outfit and mask suggest a character that might be seen in a themed event or urban scenario.
description: An adult pedestrian in a hooded jumpsuit and theatrical mask, standing upright with arms at the sides and wearing boots.
description_view_0: Front view shows the masked face, hood up, front zipper, and both arms and boots clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the mask, the hood's contour, and the straight arm and boot.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hooded jumpsuit, both arms slightly angled outward, and the back of the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mask's profile, hood, and the straight arm and boot.
attribute_clothing_type: full-body hooded jumpsuit with front zipper and fitted sleeves and pants
